Status: Sort:
Recall mode
🧺 Recall basket
1. By ingredient or lot

A supplier has recalled an ingredient, or I suspect one.

2. By batch number

A customer reported a problem with cookies from a specific batch.

3. By customer / organisation

A customer reported a problem but doesn't know their batch.

4. By date range

I need to recall everything baked in a period while I investigate.

🚨
Recall Action Checklist
MPI / SS&S compliant · Work through each step in order · Stay calm — you have a plan.
Step 1 — Investigate
Step 2 — Inform MPI / verifier (self-initiated recalls)
⏱ You must report your recall decision to NZFS within 24 hours.
📞 0800 00 83 33 — ask for a Food Coordinator
✉ Food.Recalls@mpi.govt.nz
Step 2 — Supplier action (supplier-initiated recalls)
Step 3 — Contact recipients
Recipients pre-filled from your allocation records for the affected batches. Tick each one as you contact them.
Recipients shown are drawn from allocation records for selected batches. Add any additional contacts below.
Step 4 — Audit & close out
Step 5 — Review & prevent recurrence
Complete this within a few weeks of the recall. Complex cases may take longer.
Past recall records
No recall records saved yet.

Ingredient categories

e.g. Baking Staples, Fondant, Chocolate. Editing or deleting a category name does not affect existing ingredient records.

Product types

e.g. Fondant — Black, Cinnamon Sugar. These are drawn from your actual ingredient records. Editing a name updates it across all matching records.

Edit checklists

Changes save automatically and update the live checklists immediately.

Equipment register

List the equipment in your kitchen. Items added here appear as suggestions when recording maintenance checks.

📋 Record retention policy

All records in this app are retained for a minimum of 4 years, as required by the Cookie & Me Food Control Plan. No auto-purge is configured. Records are stored in Supabase cloud storage and are accessible to both Kersti and Geordie. For audit purposes, records can be exported via History → Export.

🏪 Supplier register

Manage your approved supplier list. Full supplier records are in the Suppliers tab — this is a quick-access shortcut.

📚 Step library

Manage your reusable method steps. Drag steps to reorder within a group. Drag group headers to reorder groups.

Add a new group
📥 Import from spreadsheet

Upload your Excel or CSV file to add all your ingredients at once.

📦 Import historical batch records

Imports your 8 historical batches (B001–B008), cross-referencing lot numbers against your current inventory to auto-fill stock IDs. Review and edit each batch after import.

🍪 Seed Cookie & Me recipes

Import the full Cookie & Me recipe library (11 recipes). This will replace any existing recipes with the same name.

⚠️ Actions in this section permanently delete data and cannot be undone. Export a backup first via History → Export before using these tools.
🗑 Clear finished / closed inventory

Removes all ingredients with status "history" (finished items). Use this to clean up corrupt closed records without touching active stock.

🗑 Clear all ingredients

Removes ALL ingredients including active inventory, opened items, and history. Use only to recover from a completely broken import.

🗑 Clear all recipes

Permanently deletes all saved recipes. You can re-import them from the Import tab.

♻️ Restore ingredients from 24 Apr 2026 backup

Restores all 103 ingredient records from the last known good backup. This overwrites the current values of those records in Supabase but does not delete any records added after the backup. Any ingredients you have added since 24 April will be kept.

🗑 Deleted records

Records deleted from the app are kept here. Restore to bring them back, or delete permanently to remove them forever.

Pipeline: ① Design sent  ② Design approved  ③ Baked  ④ Iced  ⑤ Packaged  ⑥ Delivered
New Order
Section 1 — Customer
New customer
Social media
Delivery / Fulfilment
Section 2 — Design Brief
3 iterations included. Extra charged separately.
Design files & inspiration images

Attach logo files, brand guides, inspiration photos, or reference images. Images and PDFs accepted.

Section 3 — Cookie Varieties

One design per order included. Up to 3 varieties (add more rows if needed).

Section 4 — Pricing & Payment

Section 5 — Cookie Allocation

Icing entries tagged to this order appear here automatically. To add entries, go to the Icing tab and select this order when recording a session — or use the Allocation tab to link unallocated entries.

Section 6 — Allergen & Acknowledgement
Allergen Notice: Our cookies are made in a kitchen that handles gluten, eggs, dairy, tree nuts, and soy. They are not suitable for people with severe allergies. Edible decorations may contain additional allergens.
Batches linked to this order

Record feedback, notes about what worked well or what to change, and attach photos of the finished cookies.
